title: Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub for Notion
description:
Stop juggling brokerage apps, dusty spreadsheets, and mental math. The Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub is an all-in-one Notion template that gives you a crystal-clear view of your money — investments, income, expenses, dividends, and net worth — in a single, beautifully organized workspace.

Track every stock, ETF, crypto position, and real estate holding with automatic ROI and unrealized gain calculations. Log every dividend and distribution received. Set monthly budgets by category and measure actual spending against your targets. Record all income streams — salary, freelance, rental, dividends — in one place. Define meaningful financial goals and watch your progress grow.

Built for the everyday investor who is comfortable with Notion but tired of financial chaos. Whether you're building wealth from scratch or managing a growing portfolio, this template gives you the structure and insight to make smarter money decisions — without needing a financial advisor or complex software.

8 interconnected databases. Automated formulas for ROI, progress tracking, and net worth. A central dashboard that answers the three questions that matter most: How much have I invested? How much have I made? And where does my money actually go?
features: Automated ROI calculations show your total return, unrealized gains, and cost basis for every investment position without manual math.
8 fully connected databases — Portfolio, Distributions, Accounts, Income, Expenses, Budget, Goals, and Net Worth — work together in one unified workspace.
A central Dashboard aggregates your portfolio overview, recent transactions, net worth snapshot, and goal progress so your entire financial life is visible at a glance.
Monthly Budget Tracker lets you set category-level spending targets and compare them against actual expenses to instantly spot where your money is going.
Financial Goals database with built-in progress percentage and months-remaining formulas keeps you motivated and on track toward every milestone.

faq.q: Do I need to know how to code or build Notion formulas to use this template?
faq.a: No coding or formula knowledge required. All formulas — including ROI calculations, budget tracking, and goal progress — are pre-built and ready to use. You simply enter your data and the template does the math for you.

faq.q: Can I track multiple brokerage accounts and asset types in one place?
faq.a: Absolutely. The Accounts database supports taxable brokerages, Roth IRAs, 401(k)s, HSAs, crypto wallets, and more. The Investment Portfolio database tracks stocks, ETFs, crypto, bonds, real estate, and other asset classes — all linked to the correct account.

faq.q: Does this template require a Notion paid plan?
faq.a: This template works on Notion's free plan for personal use. However, if you plan to share it with a partner or financial collaborator, a Notion paid plan may be required. The full feature set — including all databases, formulas, and linked views — is accessible on the free tier for individual users.
